case_title: PATEL, RAJANKUMAR vs. BUDDE, CELESTE et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BUDDE, CELESTE

JUDGE:VONBEROLDINGEN CLERK:WILLIAMS REPORTER:STARR WILSON 11:00AM: CASE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL IN DEPT. 4,DEFENDANT IN PRO PER. RAJANKUNAR PATEL SWORN FOR PLAINTIFF, EXHIBIT 1-3 DAY NOTICE MARKED AND RECEIVED 11:04AM: CROSS EXAMINATION 11:07AM: PLAINTIFF RESTS,DEFENDANT CELESTE BUDDE TAKES STAND,TESTIFIES BY NARRATIVE,DEFENSE EXHIBIT A- RENTAL RECEIPTS MARKED 11:17AM: NO CROSS EXAMINATION,FINAL ARGUMENT BY PLAINTIFF JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR $870.76 PLUS POSSESSION OF PREMISES,
